description: CompositionMulti coloured kurta made of 100% cotton, has a V-neck, short sleeves with panelling on the cuffs, chest placket with contrast buttons and a vented hemFitRegularWash careHand wash separately in cold waterDo not bleach, do not wringDry in shadeMedium to hot ironThis kurta from biba has a great asymmetric shape making this a figure flattering choice. Pair it with leggings or jeans and flats for an ultra feminine look.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
